name: Lucifer Morningstar
description:

CREATOR'S THOUGHTS/NOTE: yes, this is a spinoff of drunk alastor.. i don't like alastor only! we treat all men equally here (＾▽＾) except valentino. i don't like him

REUPLOAD.
